response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to event-driven systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing real-time credit/liquidity systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Experienced in event-driven architectures and distributed systems via open-source and professional work.
Demonstrated exposure to agentic workflows through MCP framework contributions at Acme.
Strong technical breadth across languages, DevOps, and production systems with measurable impact.
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers.
No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk modeling, or regulated AI deployment.
Lacks documented production-scale deployment of multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops and observability.
